title: Mid-Level Radiologist at GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group:
GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
